title: Verify the design of Test Suite Detail page

steps.stepname: Log in to the Qualityfolio application with valid credentials.
Navigate to the Test Suites overview page (e.g., `/test-suite-cases-summary.sql`).
Click on a test suite to open the Test Suite Detail page.
Inspect the page header for proper alignment, font size, and consistent styling of the suite name and metadata.
Verify that all data tables render with uniform column widths, proper cell padding, and correct text alignment.
Check that status badges (passed, failed, skipped) display the correct colors, labels, and consistent sizing.
Verify that icons and visual indicators render without clipping, distortion, or misalignment.
steps.error_message: Some icons are clipped and misaligned on the Test Suite Detail page.

steps.stepname: Review spacing and margins between sections for visual consistency and adherence to the design system.
Resize the browser window to verify responsive layout behavior at common breakpoints (desktop, tablet, mobile).
Check for any overlapping elements, text truncation, or broken UI components.
